title: Oh My GOD POCO
description: Graphic & Sound Resource Pack - Replaces explosive items with the Poco X3 Pro phone, featuring new TNT and explosion sounds. Perfect for fun gameplay, memes, and gaming video clips.
body:
1. POCO Bomb Pack – A funny, graphic & sound resource pack that replaces Minecraft TNT with Poco X3 Pro phones.


2. Features – Custom bomb-style textures and new explosion sounds.


3. Perfect for – Fun gameplay, memes, and gaming video clips.

   
4. Extra – Normal Map Support –
The textures include normal maps. When using shaders, enable Normal Map in your shader’s material settings to see enhanced surface depth and texture details.


5. How to Install:
Download Oh My GOD POCO.zip - if you're using a launcher, it installs automatically.
If downloaded manually, move it to the Minecraft/resourcepacks folder.
You can also install C4 Button.zip (optional) using the same steps.
Test video:
https://t.me/MJ_Projects404/32


6. To support the developer and see more projects in the future, follow our Telegram channel:   https://t.me/MJ_Projects404
